since_last: 41% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.72%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.83% · Gold -1.63% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 41% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.72%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.72%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -6.54%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +5.03%, PUBM +4.98%, NOW +4.81%, CRNC +3.56%, HON +2.06%. Laggards: TSLA -6.54%, GOOGL -4.83%, NRG -3.56%, NXPI -2.48%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.61% at $115.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.61% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
